templates.name: App shell
templates.description: CyberSkill product shell — Sidebar navigation, topbar with search, KPI Stats, and a DataTable. Bilingual (English · Tiếng Việt).

templates.name: Article
templates.description: CyberSkill long-form article / blog post — title, author meta, prose, callout, and code block. Bilingual (English · Tiếng Việt).

templates.name: Board · Executive memo
templates.description: CyberSkill one-page executive memo — TO/FROM/RE header, recommendation, context, and a single clear ask.

templates.name: Board · Investor update email
templates.description: CyberSkill stakeholder update — numbers, wins, honest lowlights, asks. External comms, EN-first with a Tiếng Việt switch.

templates.name: Board · Meeting deck
templates.description: CyberSkill 16:9 board deck — title, financials, portfolio, risks & asks, closing. Stacked slides; umber + ochre. Bilingual (English · Tiếng Việt).

templates.name: Board · Meeting minutes
templates.description: CyberSkill board minutes — attendance, resolutions with votes, actions. Letter-sized, print-ready. EN·VN.

templates.name: Board · Quarterly report
templates.description: CyberSkill board business review — KPI stats, highlights, portfolio table, risks, and an AI-assisted disclosure. Document-style page. Bilingual (English · Tiếng Việt).

templates.name: Board · Resolution
templates.description: CyberSkill written board resolution — recitals, resolved clauses, director signatures. Counsel-gated draft: banner-marked, legal review required. Bilingual (English · Tiếng Việt).

templates.name: Culture · Event invite
templates.description: CyberSkill internal event invite email — what/when/where, RSVP CTA. Bilingual EN·VN·Both.

templates.name: Delivery · Change note
templates.description: CyberSkill change note — the signed scope/fee/timeline amendment the MSA and SOW reference. Bilingual (English · Tiếng Việt). Letter-sized, print-ready.

templates.name: Delivery · Kickoff doc
templates.description: CyberSkill project kickoff — goals, team & roles, cadence, milestones, risks, links. Letter-sized, print-ready. Bilingual (English · Tiếng Việt).

templates.description: CyberSkill quarterly business review for a client — quarter results, shipped work, health, next quarter, renewal ask. Stacked 16:9 slides. Bilingual (English · Tiếng Việt).

templates.name: Delivery · Runbook / handover
templates.description: CyberSkill service handover — system overview, environments, deploy, monitoring, contacts, acceptance sign-off. Bilingual (English · Tiếng Việt). Letter-sized, print-ready.

templates.name: Delivery · Weekly status email
templates.description: CyberSkill client status update — progress bar, shipped/next lists, one clear ask, Status Hub CTA. Bilingual EN·VN.

templates.description: The CyberSkill document presentation standard for EVERY template — palette, type, bilingual rule, tables, fill-ins, signing blocks, plus how the rules map to non-print archetypes. Rules preserved verb

templates.description: CyberSkill quote / estimate — scope lines, optional add-ons, total, valid-until, accept CTA. Letter-sized, print-ready.

templates.description: CyberSkill company-wide announcement email — new hire, policy, or milestone. Warm, direct, centred layout.

templates.description: Lawyer-validated CyberSkill code of conduct — the four values, working together, gifts & hospitality, conflicts of interest, public speaking, anti-bribery, speaking up. A4, VN·EN, print-ready. Content

templates.description: Lawyer-validated CyberSkill infosec & acceptable-use policy — devices, accounts & passwords, AI-tool use, software, incident severity table, leaving, breach. A4, VN·EN, print-ready. Content verbatim.
